title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Vishal Mega Mart

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Vishal Mega Mart
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Vishal Mega Mart! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Agra team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Vishal Mega Mart:
Vishal Mega Mart is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vishal Mega Mart!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
